task_objective: Create a standalone HTML diagram explaining the automatic sync status bar game state flows.

design_decisions: Use a standalone HTML document with embedded CSS and no external assets.
Show launch and exit flows side by side with branch cards for action, up-to-date, unknown, and unable-to-sync outcomes.
Include a reason mapping table so backend reasons map directly to status bar behavior.
